Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Abusing Customizable Selects 109 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. A 6502 disassembler with a TUI: A modern take on Regenerator 28 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain 89 upvotes, 8 comments
  4. IRIX 3dfx Voodoo driver and glide2x IRIX port 65 upvotes, 6 comments
  5. Log File Viewer for the Terminal 93 upvotes, 11 comments
  6. Autoresearch on an old research idea 352 upvotes, 72 comments
  7. Gerd Faltings, who proved the Mordell conjecture, wins the Abel Prize 29 upvotes, 3 comments
  8. Sunsetting the Techempower Framework Benchmarks 37 upvotes, 5 comments
  9. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 202 upvotes, 51 comments
  10. Claude Code Cheat Sheet 373 upvotes, 110 comments
  11. Box of Secrets: Discreetly modding an apartment intercom to work with Apple Home 105 upvotes, 27 comments
  12. A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp 88 upvotes, 23 comments
  13. Pompeii's battle scars linked to an ancient 'machine gun' 71 upvotes, 18 comments
  14. BIO – The Bao I/O Co-Processor 35 upvotes, 7 comments
  15. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 196 upvotes, 69 comments
  16. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 157 upvotes, 54 comments
  17. Show HN: Cq – Stack Overflow for AI coding agents 137 upvotes, 48 comments
  18. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 599 upvotes, 271 comments
  19. MagicAudio – Free Noise, Echo and Background Music Remover 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. Opera: Rewind The Web to 1996 (Opera at 30) 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. An incoherent Rust 185 upvotes, 90 comments
  22. How I'm Productive with Claude Code 196 upvotes, 116 comments
  23. FCC updates covered list to include foreign-made consumer routers 305 upvotes, 205 comments
  24. Pool spare GPU capacity to run LLMs at larger scale 10 upvotes, 2 comments
  25. Epoch confirms GPT5.4 Pro solved a frontier math open problem 321 upvotes, 314 comments
  26. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 269 upvotes, 279 comments
  27. How to Spot a Liar: Kate White on the Techniques of Deception in Mysteries 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. Microservices and the First Law of Distributed Objects (2014) 13 upvotes, 7 comments
  29. Show HN: ProofShot – Give AI coding agents eyes to verify the UI they build 13 upvotes, 10 comments
  30. The Resolv hack: How one compromised key printed $23M 87 upvotes, 119 comments

Last generated 5:00pm, 24 March 2026. Source here.
